caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt featuring the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" sits in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone on a boom arm. Behind him, the wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs, and a white male mannequin wearing a white t-shirt stands to his right, near a rack of hanging clothes. Small logos appear in the bottom corners of the scene, including one that reads "TOT". Across the sequence, the man's facial expression shifts from a neutral, slightly pensive look with closed lips to an open-mouthed expression as he speaks, tilting his head slightly. The background remains static while the man remains centered in the frame, interacting with an unseen person off-camera.
